hero.visionBadge: A Father's Vision, The World's Canvas
hero.description: Transform your emotions into digital masterpieces with over 40 elite AI models. Mint them as NFTs on OpenSea and Zora with a single click. Built not just for profit, but for the boundless future of creativity.

story.title: A Future Coded with Love
story.p1: Every great innovation starts with an inner spark. While most tech projects are born with profit margins in mind, ZexAI's foundation rests on a much more unshakable power: <1>A father's boundless love and hope for his daughter.</1>
story.p2: Do you know what it's like for a father with a sick daughter to go days without sleep? That exhausted body never lets his mind give up. Because that wait is not for a reward, but simply for that innocent soul to regain her health.
story.p3: That is exactly the tireless, expectation-free energy from which ZexAI's spirit was born. It is not just a company; it is a <1>colossal art factory that removes the barriers to creativity, hope, and value creation.</1>
story.p4: We designed this platform with an "AI and NFT" focus to offer the entire world that safe playground a father provides his child, and to integrate millions who never stop dreaming into the Web3 economy.

campaign.title: ZexAI Ecosystem & Opportunities
campaign.subtitle: A decentralized platform built on transparency, love, and visionary utility. Generate, mint to NFT, earn, and be part of the physical future.

vision.agentDesc: Just type "Hope" and let the Synapse Agent craft the perfect prompt for a breathtaking artwork. No prompt engineering required.
vision.mintDesc: ZexAI allows you to become a globally recognized artist in seconds. Generate images or videos with AI and mint them as NFTs on the world's largest marketplaces with a single click.
vision.whyWin1: Full commercial, royalty-free rights for all generations
vision.whyWin2: Direct, gas-optimized minting from the dashboard

tokenomics.title: $ZEX Distribution Plan
tokenomics.desc: A fair, long-term, and community-focused distribution model. Built for sustainability, not short-term speculation. Team tokens are fully locked for 1 year.

tiers.name: 10% - Team & Founders
tiers.desc: 1 Year Full Lock (We are here to stay)

tokenomics.utilityDesc: Token holders earn passive income from the platform's Revenue Share, benefit from generation discounts, and participate in periodic "Buyback & Burn" events.
tokenomics.burnDesc: : $ZEX is bought back from the market using ecosystem revenues and burned.
tokenomics.yieldDesc: : Stakers earn a share of subscription and generation revenues.

robot.title: ZexAI Humanoid Robot (Founder's Edition)
robot.desc: Transcend the limits of software! Own a custom-built Humanoid Robot, 100% integrated into the ZexAI ecosystem. The first batch is strictly limited to <1>only 80 units</1> and will never be produced again.
robot.raffleDesc: Earn your raffle ticket by purchasing <1>at least 10,000 ZEX</1> during the presale. Catch the chance to win a free Humanoid Robot in our viral campaign!
